title: Telegram Bot Message Flow
interaction_flow: tgapp → handle_msg: MessageHandler dispatches update, ctx
_stream: on done=True → scan for [FILE:path] tokens → msg.reply_photo or msg.reply_document
_stream: final edit_text with clean text, break loop
GeneraticAgent (background thread) → agent_runner_loop: LLM turn loop
agent_runner_loop → dq (queue): yield interim/done chunks visible to _stream
command_flows: /llm <n> (cmd_llm): agent.next_llm(n) → reply switched LLM name; no arg → list all LLMs
key_relationships: _stream consumes dq (queue) produced by GeneraticAgent background thread
_stream calls _clean() then _to_html() before every Telegram edit
cmd_abort calls GeneraticAgent.abort() and cancels the asyncio stream_task
agent_runner_loop is the core LLM loop called inside GeneraticAgent.run()
agent_runner_loop yields text chunks to the queue consumed by _stream

key_functions._clean(t): Strips XML-style tags (thinking/summary/tool_use/file_content) via regex; collapses 3+ newlines; returns '...' if empty
key_functions._to_html(t): Converts markdown to Telegram HTML: fenced code blocks → <pre><code>, **bold** → <b>, *italic* → <i>, `inline` → <code>; HTML-escapes non-code segments
key_functions._stream(dq, msg): Async loop, polls queue every 3s; edits Telegram message with latest chunk + ⏳ spinner; splits at 4000 chars; on done sends FILE attachments and final edit
key_functions.handle_msg(update, ctx): Auth check → reply 'thinking...' → build prompt → agent.put_task → create _stream task
key_functions.cmd_llm(update, ctx): Switches or lists LLM models via agent.next_llm(n) / agent.list_llms()
key_functions.agent_runner_loop(...): Multi-turn LLM loop: build messages → client.chat → parse tool_calls → handler.dispatch → accumulate results → turn_end_callback; yields streamed output

data_flow.queue (dq): put_task returns a queue; GeneraticAgent pushes {next: str} chunks and final {done: str} item; _stream polls it
data_flow.msg object: Initial Telegram message placeholder; continuously edited in-place by _stream; replaced by new message when text exceeds 4000 chars
data_flow.FILE tokens: [FILE:filepath] in agent response triggers reply_photo or reply_document attachments

startup_sequence: Handlers registered: /stop → cmd_abort, /llm → cmd_llm, TEXT → handle_msg
important_notes: Auth via ALLOWED set from mykeys['tg_allowed_users']; proxy from mykeys['proxy']. Bot restarts automatically on polling crash (sleep 10s + new event loop). agent_runner_loop max_turns=40 default. Non-verbose mode used in tgapp (agent.verbose=False) — yields cleaned content lines to queue.
